home.subtitle: Rate, map and rank your favourite bars.

add.title: Add a bar
add.desc: Enter the name, drop the pin on the map and rate the bar to add it to the database.

map.title: View the map
map.desc: Show every bar on an interactive map with their ratings.

ranking.title: View the ranking
ranking.desc: Compare bars by average score and find the best spots.

editBar.title: Edit a bar
editBar.confirmText: This action is permanent. “{{name}}” will be removed from the database.

form.nameHelper: Type the name: we look it up in Rouen and place the pin.
form.validation: Enter the name and click the map to place the bar.
